description: End-to-end replay of pr-reviewer's `review` agent step plus the gh-shim+external-call-log harness plumbing. Forwards a github.pull_request webhook payload (opened, kota/task/* head branch, non-fork) through `kota workflow exec --payload`, replays the agent step from a synthesized recording so the regression-gate path is covered without a real LLM call, and asserts the gh CLI invocation shape via the new `external-call-log` predicate. The fixture is the first consumer of the fake-binary shim mechanism; it locks both the predicate kind and the shim's PATH-prepend wiring against future regressions.

triggerPayload.title: Add cache-warming task to inbox-sorter
triggerPayload.actorIntegrityReason: author association 'MEMBER' satisfies the configured trust threshold

provenance.justification: pr-reviewer has zero real-failure runs to encode (the workflow only fires on github.pull_request webhooks and KOTA's own dogfood loop has not produced one yet), so this fixture is the harness-plumbing gate for two new primitives: (1) the `external-call-log` predicate kind that asserts properties of recorded out-of-process command invocations, and (2) the fixture-scoped fake-binary shim mechanism that prepends `<workingDir>/.kota/shims/` to PATH so `gh` invocations land in `<workingDir>/.kota/external-calls/gh.jsonl` rather than the host's real gh. The synthesized recording mirrors the shape a real pr-reviewer run would produce — `gh pr review 42 --approve --body ...` plus a JSON verdict block — so the predicate's argv matchers and the workflow's outputFormat:json + emit step path are exercised end-to-end. Replace with a real-failure fixture (and flip `kind` to `real-failure` with the captured sourceRunId) when the first bad pr-reviewer run lands.
